message.reasoning:

The reasoning mentions susceptibility due to neuroticism and low openness, but also notes the T1 atomic burst with no personalization and hours of exposure produces only a modest deepening. That seems consistent. No opposite movement. Score is not round (427 is okay). The plausibility and consistency are high.
